scenarios.injection: Corrupt checksum/malformed counters in a copy of a sanitized capture.
scenarios.recovery: Replay the unmodified capture and confirm transport counters return to baseline.

scenarios.injection: Use the existing demo control to reduce consumer service rate.
scenarios.recovery: Restore the original consumer rate and verify FIFO level and stalls return to baseline.

scenarios.injection: Apply a bounded demo stall/duty parameter.
scenarios.recovery: Restore the recorded baseline parameter and compare the same metric window.

scenarios.injection: Arm with a safe trigger expression known not to occur during the window.
scenarios.recovery: Stop/clear the analyzer and restore the baseline trigger configuration.

scenarios.injection: Remove one chunk from a copy of a sanitized board capture.
scenarios.recovery: Use the unmodified capture and confirm chunk/sample counts and integrity hash.
